//: The node `tsc` build compiles the cli boot + the web serve host (bin/run.js, bin/serve.js). The browser + Electron sources build via vite / electron-vite (see electron.vite.config.ts, targets/web/vite.web.config.ts) and are excluded here — they use DOM libs a Node tsconfig doesn't carry. See tsconfig.web.json for their typecheck config.
